lines.english: Why did Patrick keep on asking the same question?
lines.chinese: 帕特里克为什么一直问同一个问题？
lines.raw: Why did Patrick keep on asking the same question? | 帕特里克为什么一直问同一个问题？

lines.english: The former Prime Minister, Mr. Wentworth Lane, was defeated in the recent elections.
lines.chinese: 前首相温特沃斯·莱恩先生在最近的选举中失利。
lines.raw: The former Prime Minister, Mr. Wentworth Lane, was defeated in the recent elections. | 前首相温特沃斯·莱恩先生在最近的选举中失利。

lines.english: He is now retiring from political life and has gone abroad.
lines.chinese: 他现在正退出政坛，并且已经出国了。
lines.raw: He is now retiring from political life and has gone abroad. | 他现在正退出政坛，并且已经出国了。

lines.english: My friend, Patrick, has always been a fanatical opponent of Mr. Lane's Radical Progressive Party.
lines.chinese: 我的朋友帕特里克一直是莱恩先生激进进步党的狂热反对者。
lines.raw: My friend, Patrick, has always been a fanatical opponent of Mr. Lane's Radical Progressive Party. | 我的朋友帕特里克一直是莱恩先生激进进步党的狂热反对者。

lines.english: After the elections, Patrick went to the former Prime Minister's house.
lines.chinese: 选举结束后，帕特里克去了前首相的家。
lines.raw: After the elections, Patrick went to the former Prime Minister's house. | 选举结束后，帕特里克去了前首相的家。

lines.english: When he asked if Mr. Lane lived there, the policeman on duty told him that since his defeat, the ex-Prime Minister had gone abroad.
lines.chinese: 当他问莱恩先生是否住在那儿时，值班警察告诉他，自从失利后，这位前首相就出国了。
lines.raw: When he asked if Mr. Lane lived there, the policeman on duty told him that since his defeat, the ex-Prime Minister had gone abroad. | 当他问莱恩先生是否住在那儿时，值班警察告诉他，自从失利后，这位前首相就出国了。

lines.english: On the following day Patrick went to the house again.
lines.chinese: 第二天，帕特里克又去了那所房子。
lines.raw: On the following day Patrick went to the house again. | 第二天，帕特里克又去了那所房子。

lines.english: The same policeman was just walking slowly past the entrance, when Patrick asked the same question.
lines.chinese: 还是那个警察，他正慢慢地走过入口，这时帕特里克又问了同样的问题。
lines.raw: The same policeman was just walking slowly past the entrance, when Patrick asked the same question. | 还是那个警察，他正慢慢地走过入口，这时帕特里克又问了同样的问题。

lines.english: Though a little suspicious this time the policeman gave him the same answer.
lines.chinese: 尽管这次有些怀疑，警察还是给了他同样的答案。
lines.raw: Though a little suspicious this time the policeman gave him the same answer. | 尽管这次有些怀疑，警察还是给了他同样的答案。

lines.english: The day after, Patrick went to the house once more and asked exactly the same question.
lines.chinese: 第二天，帕特里克又一次去了那所房子，问了完全相同的问题。
lines.raw: The day after, Patrick went to the house once more and asked exactly the same question. | 第二天，帕特里克又一次去了那所房子，问了完全相同的问题。

lines.english: This time, the policeman lost his temper.
lines.raw: This time, the policeman lost his temper. | 这次，警察发火了。

lines.english: 'I told you yesterday and the day before yesterday,' he shouted,
lines.chinese: “我昨天和前天都告诉你了，”他喊道，
lines.raw: 'I told you yesterday and the day before yesterday,' he shouted, | “我昨天和前天都告诉你了，”他喊道，
'Mr.Lane was defeated in the elections. | “莱恩先生在选举中失利了。

lines.english: He has retired from political life and gone to live abroad!'
lines.chinese: 他已经退出政坛并出国定居了！”
lines.raw: He has retired from political life and gone to live abroad!' | 他已经退出政坛并出国定居了！”

lines.english: 'I know,' answered Patrick,' but I love to hear you say it!'
lines.chinese: “我知道，”帕特里克回答说，“但我喜欢听你说！”
lines.raw: 'I know,' answered Patrick,' but I love to hear you say it!' | “我知道，”帕特里克回答说，“但我喜欢听你说！”
